lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, what ales are you serving?

lines.speaker: Tostig
lines.text: Well [mister/miss], our speciality is Asgarnian Ale, we also serve Wizard's Mind Bomb and Dwarven Stout.

lines.speaker: Tostig
lines.text: Would you like to buy a drink?

lines.speaker: Tostig
lines.text: Ah well... so um... does the grey squirrel sing in the grove?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, and the black cat dances in the sink.

lines.speaker: Tostig
lines.text: Ah you'll be wanting the trapdoor behind the bar.
